text: I feel as though I have wandered into a liminal space, where the boundaries between work, innovation, and solitude blur beneath the cool, artificial lights. The sterile brightness outside this glass-walled room contrasts sharply with the purple-blue glow emanating from within. This place seems dedicated to innovation and research—perhaps a lab or a development hub. Yet, it is quiet and empty, filled with the anticipation of potential but devoid of human energy now. I am both fascinated and slightly uneasy, as though on the threshold of discovery and isolation.
